description.value:
Prerequisite: Survival 4, Swim 4. To sign a blood pact, you must find the appropriate Contract. See Chapter 9 for details on obtaining contracts and the various summon tribes.

Benefit: You can summon creatures of the Shark tribe, and gain a +4 bonus to Charisma-based skill checks used on such creatures. While within 50 feet of a summoned Shark, you gain the ability to smell blood in the air up to 200 feet.
description.summary: Summon Shark tribe; +4 Cha skill checks vs. Sharks; the ability to smell blood in the air up to 200 feet within 50 ft of summon.
